title: peganum mexicanum
intro: Peganum mexicanum, also known as Mexican poppy or jraj, is a perennial plant native to the deserts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peganum mexicanum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and cardiovascular health. Peganum mexicanum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
